jummah_times: Jumu'ah Lecture: 12:00pm, Jumu'ah Adhan: 12:17-12:24pm, Jumu'ah Khutbah: 12:25-12:30pm, Gate 4 Opens
eid_salah: 1st Jamaat: lecture after fajr jamaat, eid salah at 6:25am. 2nd Jamaat: lecture at 8:30, eid salah at 9:00am
notes: No Salat is permitted during the 10 minutes before Zawal time. Timetable subject to sighting of the new moon. Listen LIVE on: emasjidlive.co.uk/listen/madanimasjid and https://www.youtube.com/@MCCSoundBytes/streams. Download timetable from madani.school. Sadaqatul Fitr must be paid before the Eid Salah. The timetable has no separate fajr_start, zohr, or maghrib_jamaat columns — the Dawn/Subh Sadiq/Suhoor Ends column is a single combined column mapped to sehri_ends.
